text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been raining like mad since this morning. Amid
the occasional thunderclaps, T.M. Opera O
begins to shout.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, you sky! Mark my words! I will not yield to
your storms!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Braids
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Give it a rest, Oppy. There's nothing you can do when it's raining this hard.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Ponytails
text_block_list.text:
We have to let the fans know it's canceled now.
What a shame—we'd been preparing for so long.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do not lose heart!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: There's still time! Please... put your faith in me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... You see...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
We were supposed to put on a play outside
today.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It was going to be part of our volunteer work. But
in this weather, well...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No! The heavens are merely testing my resolve!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pat, pat, pat!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uwhaa?! O-Opera O?! Where are you—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me, sky! You heavens! You bolts of
lightning! Try as you may, you cannot drown out
my voice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I chase after Opera O, who seems to be heading
for the roof. I race up the stairs, desperate to
keep up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh! Crack! Boom!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will inspire the people! Be there rain in my face,
wind in my hair, or thunder in my ears!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My will shall never waver! For it is I!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The Centurial Overlord... The T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch her howling at the sky while she gets
battered by the elements.
choice_data_list: Are you trying to catch a cold?!
Are you trying to catch a cold?!
Hear me rain! Stop this instant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch her howling at the sky while she gets
battered by the elements.
choice_data_list: Are you trying to catch a cold?!
Are you trying to catch a cold?!
Hear me rain! Stop this instant!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I lead her back inside to put on some dry clothes
right away.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Alas, I could not convey to the heavens the entirety of my conviction.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but... you would have caught a cold if you
stayed any longer.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O, look! Out the window!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Could it be?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The rain... It has ceased!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: At this rate, it should be sunny by the afternoon!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! You heard me in the end, o
heavens!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though you might act again in defiance, know
that I remain standing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Rebel all you wish, but my will shall never falter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun comes out in full force that afternoon,
not a cloud left to be seen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O shines even brighter than usual
among the glistening water droplets that dress
the surrounding trees, and the crowd gives a
standing ovation as the curtain falls.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we spend some time yelling at the sky, I
lead her inside to put some dry clothes on right
away.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Going out in the middle of a downpour... You're
going to get yourself sick.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Anything less would not have gotten my
feelings across to that mischievous sky.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: See for yourself!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: No way... The rain stopped!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Behold the power of my will!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even the sun cannot bear to go without my
radiance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Praise me if you must! For I am—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, no! I-I'll go get some tea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun comes out in full force that afternoon,
not a cloud left to be seen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O appears fine. In fact, she shines
brighter than ever, and her performance goes off
without a hitch.
